summary: Iter 192 — Employee Advance Management System (backend + frontend) regression PASSED. Backend: 25/25 pytest cases green including create-validation, actual-salary sync (adv=2000, recovered 2000, remaining 22000), idempotent re-run (txn count stays 1), compliance 'both' mirror (balance unchanged, MAHAVEER compliance net=0 → no mirror created), skip_month with mandatory remarks, pause→on_hold + resume→active, EMI edit >remaining rejected, EMI edit ok, delete-after-recovery blocked 400, waive w/o remarks 400, recover_full mode=fnf → closed, list summary, dashboard KPIs, all report kinds (register/outstanding/monthly_recovery/recovery_history) + xlsx content-type, ESS /api/me/advances via TEST50 pin login. Frontend: /advances renders with 3 tabs, Company selector, New Advance modal (employee search + Salary/Loan/Emergency/etc + Cash/Bank/UPI/Cheque + Single/EMI + start month + recovery source Both) creates ADV-00001 which appears on Ledger with progress bar + status ACTIVE badge; row → detail modal opens with action buttons act-pause/act-skip/act-full/act-delete. Pause action via UI (with dialog auto-accepted) toggled status to on_hold successfully. Delete before recovery succeeded (advances list back to empty). Reports tab exposes 9 report kinds + Export Excel button (testID='export-xlsx') renders Advance Register table. /my-advances renders on mobile viewport with Outstanding/Recovered/Active summary boxes and 'You have no advances' empty state as expected (employee has none currently — API returns empty).

issues: Pre-existing console noise: 'Invalid style property of outline / background / padding' + 'shadow* style props deprecated'. Not new to this iter but still emitted from RN Web styling in various shared components.

action_items: None blocking. Optional: silence pre-existing console warnings for 'outline'/'background'/'padding'/'shadow*' RN-Web deprecations flagged across admin pages (pre-existing, not from this iter).
critical_code_review_comments: advances.py apply_advance_recovery is well-structured: idempotency check (same-process txn reuse) + 'both'-source mirror path (balance_applied=False, no balance decrement) + row net cap via max(0, available) — deduction can never make net negative. Priority sort (PRIO_ORDER) with oldest-first tiebreak. Voucher counter is atomic via find_one_and_update upsert. Audit trail pushed on every recovery/action. All queries exclude Mongo _id. Delete-after-recovery guarded (recovered_total > 0 → 400). Waive/skip_month enforce mandatory remarks server-side. Reports supports 9 kinds + xlsx via openpyxl streaming.

advances.tsx uses testIDs consistently on all interactive elements (new-advance, tab-*, adv-row-*, act-pause/resume/skip/full/delete, save-advance, export-xlsx, report-*, adv-search, adv-filter-*, emp-search, emp-pick-*, rt-single/emi, src-*, adv-amount, adv-emi, adv-date). Confirm dialogs use shared confirmYesNo helper. Prompt used for mandatory remarks on waive/skip_month.

server.py hooks at ~14426 (compliance create), ~14799 (compliance reprocess) and ~18470 (actual salary process) call apply_advance_recovery — verified via idempotency test (rerun leaves txn count at 1 and balance unchanged).

success_rate.frontend: 100% for critical flows tested (Create → List → Detail → Pause → Delete → Reports+Export → ESS)

seed_data_creation: All ephemeral & cleaned up after run: advances collection cleared, advance_transactions cleared, attendance where source='advance-test-seed' cleared (20 docs), salary_runs 2026-07 cmp_527fecdd7c cleared, compliance_salary_runs 2026-07 cmp_527fecdd7c cleared, db.counters _id='advance_voucher' deleted. Final DB state verified: 0 advances, 0 txns, no advance_voucher counter.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New backend module /app/backend/routes/advances.py (mounted in server.py). Voucher format ADV-NNNNN via atomic counter. Recovery source 'both' mirrors deduction into 2nd process with balance_applied=False (no double decrement). Deduction capped at row net (no negative salaries). Idempotent per (advance_id, month, process_type) — re-runs reuse existing txn amount. /admin/advances/reports supports kinds: register|outstanding|monthly_recovery|department|contractor|company|closed|pending|recovery_history + format=xlsx. Frontend /advances has 3 tabs (Dashboard/Ledger/Reports) + New Advance modal. Employee ESS /api/me/advances returns advances+schedule+transactions+summary. On WEB, /my-advances is behind the employee-only mobile gate (renders on mobile viewport only). MAHAVEER SINGH user_83f0e0c387bb (code 123, daily-rate) is the canonical test employee in Kankani cmp_527fecdd7c. TEST50 pin-login (login_id=TEST50, pin=123456) works for ESS token.
rca_of_issue: No blocking bugs. During UI testing I initially observed Pause not persisting because window.confirm was auto-dismissed by Playwright's default handler; after registering page.on('dialog', d.accept()) the Pause + Resume flows worked correctly. Resume flow via UI ran to completion (dialog captured, api call fired) — final status verification was inconclusive on the last run only due to a 30s screenshot timeout (unrelated to feature). Backend pytest fully validates pause/resume idempotency. All flows behave as spec'd.
